---
title: ""
format: html
page-layout: full
---

<div class="topbar">
<div class="topbar-inner">
<a class="brand" href="index.html" aria-label="Home">
<img class="brand-logo" src="assets/icons/siteLogo.png" alt="Wave logo">
<span class="brand-text">Alex Sutherland</span>
</a>
<div class="topbar-right">
<a class="menu-button" href="#section-start" aria-label="Jump to sections">
<span></span>
<span></span>
<span></span>
</a>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="hero-block">
<div class="hero-inner hero-inner-visual">
<div class="hero-copy hero-copy-wide">
<h1 class="hero-title">Science, mathematics, and technical tools for understanding complex systems.</h1>
</div>

<div class="hero-visual" aria-hidden="true">
<canvas id="hero-waves-canvas"></canvas>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<script src="assets/js/hero-vortex.js"></script>

<div id="section-start" class="section-list">

<a class="section-link" href="research.html">
<div class="section-number">01</div>
<div class="section-text">
<div class="section-title">Research</div>
<div class="section-description">
Broad context, major questions, and the larger scientific themes tying the work together.
</div>
</div>
<div class="section-arrow">↓</div>
</a>
<div class="section-divider"></div>

<a class="section-link" href="data-analysis.html">
<div class="section-number">02</div>
<div class="section-text">
<div class="section-title">Data Analysis</div>
<div class="section-description">
Focused technical highlights in processing, modeling, statistics, and interpretation.
</div>
</div>
<div class="section-arrow">↓</div>
</a>
<div class="section-divider"></div>

<a class="section-link" href="physics-based-simulation.html">
<div class="section-number">03</div>
<div class="section-text">
<div class="section-title">Physics-Based Simulation</div>
<div class="section-description">
Numerical workflows, simulation methods, and validation work.
</div>
</div>
<div class="section-arrow">↓</div>
</a>
<div class="section-divider"></div>

<a class="section-link" href="mathematics.html">
<div class="section-number">04</div>
<div class="section-text">
<div class="section-title">Mathematics</div>
<div class="section-description">
Expository mathematical writing, concepts, and links to longer technical work.
</div>
</div>
<div class="section-arrow">↓</div>
</a>
<div class="section-divider"></div>

<a class="section-link" href="about.html">
<div class="section-number">05</div>
<div class="section-text">
<div class="section-title">About</div>
<div class="section-description">
Background, links, and CV.
</div>
</div>
<div class="section-arrow">↓</div>
</a>
<div class="section-divider"></div>

</div>
